command: shopt -s nullglob; for f in packages/desktop/native/*; do echo "$f"; done; for f in packages/desktop/native/**/*; do echo "$f"; done 2>/dev/null
reason: List native directory contents using shell globbing

command: shopt -s nullglob; for f in packages/desktop/native/build/Release/*; do echo "$f"; done; ls -la packages/desktop/native/build/Release/ 2>/dev/null; echo "---EXISTS_CHECK---"; test -f packages/desktop/
